title: Tool trace row for corpus mix (record_format: tool_trace)
description: Matches vox-corpus ToolTraceRecord. Mix normalizes to prompt/response TrainingPair JSON with category tool_trace.

task_prompt.description: User or system text that triggered the tool call

arguments_json.description: JSON-serialized arguments object (string field, not nested object)

followup_text.description: If set, becomes the training response instead of synthesized JSON

session_id.description: Optional; emitted as source tool_trace:<id> when mixing
